mapper.select:
SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.BRD_CD , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.RGT_EMAIL , CONCAT( SUBSTRING(REPLACE(F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}), '-', ''), 1, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(REPLACE(F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}), '-', ''), 4, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(REPLACE(F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}), '-', ''), 8, 4) ) AS RGT_PHONE , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM , IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , A.INQ_TYPE , CASE A.INQ_TYPE WHEN 'PROPERTY' THEN '매물문의' WHEN 'SALE' THEN '매매상담' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대상담' WHEN 'ETC' THEN '기타문의' ELSE '-' END AS INQ_TYPE_NM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST T WHERE T.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND T.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND T.PST_LVL > 0 AND T.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' ) AS REPLY_CNT , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST T WHERE T.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND T.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND T.PST_LVL > 0 AND T.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' ) > 0 THEN '답변완료' ELSE '대기' END AS REPLY_STATUS FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N'
AND (A.PST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.RGT_USR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BBS_PST SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , USE_YN = 'N' , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = SYSDATE() WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND (PST_CD = #{pstCd} OR ROT_PST_CD = #{pstCd})
mapper.select: SELECT A.PST_CD, A.PST_NM, A.PST_CNTS, A.BRD_CD, A.PST_LVL , A.RGT_USR_NM, A.RGT_EMAIL , CONCAT( SUBSTRING(REPLACE(F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}), '-', ''), 1, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(REPLACE(F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}), '-', ''), 4, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(REPLACE(F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}), '-', ''), 8, 4) ) AS RGT_PHONE , A.ATCH_FILE_KEY, IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT,0) AS VIEW_CNT , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM , A.PROP_CD , A.INQ_TYPE , CASE A.INQ_TYPE WHEN 'PROPERTY' THEN '매물문의' WHEN 'SALE' THEN '매매상담' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대상담' WHEN 'ETC' THEN '기타문의' ELSE '-' END AS INQ_TYPE_NM , P.PROP_NM FROM TB_BBS_PST A LEFT JOIN TB_PROPERTY P ON A.PROP_CD = P.PROP_CD AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.PST_CD = #{pstCd}

SELECT A.PST_CD, A.PST_NM, A.PST_CNTS, A.PST_LVL , A.RGT_USR_NM, A.ATCH_FILE_KEY , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.ROT_PST_CD = #{pstCd} AND A.PST_LVL > 0 ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM ASC
